content: TASK-065 checkpoint done: Applied Overview-style endpoint spacing rules to Prototype map routing. Prototype map edges now choose source/target sides from relative node position, allocate distinct ports per node side for both starts and ends, route through separated lanes instead of a shared center port/trunk, keep direct same-row/same-column routes when valid, and place edge labels near the source segment. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, npm run build, and browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/ confirmed 15 Prototype map edges with duplicateStarts=[] and duplicateEnds=[] after rendering the current sample. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is broader layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
